comment.body: The Jackson Hole Economic Symposium, hosted by the Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City, is scheduled for August 21-23, 2025. The event will take place at the Jackson Lake Lodge in Grand Teton National Park, Wyoming. This year's theme is "Labor Markets in Transition: Demographics, Productivity, and Macroeconomic Policy". Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell is scheduled to speak on Friday, August 23, at 10:00 a.m. EDT.
